keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $725.51 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $754.95 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Neutral — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $725.51 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA CALL — enter $10.78–$11.92, target $17.02+, stop $6.81.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +0.43% and QQQ +0.31%. Composite sentiment +13 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by vix, spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 13.87 (-2.26%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Leadership came from Energy; Healthcare lagged. Today's standouts: META +5.97%, NVDA +4.03%. Laggards: NFLX -2.78%, LLY -2.33%. Carrying NVDA as the top idea into tomorrow (6.8/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
